lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗੁਨ ਅਪਸਗੁਨ ਤਿਸ ਕਉ ਲਗਹਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਚੀਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sagun apasagun tis kau lageh jis cheet na aavai |
lines.english: Good omens and bad omens affect those who do not keep the Lord in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਹਉ ਵਾਰਿਆ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਆਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guroo vittahu hau vaariaa jis mil sach suaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to the Guru; meeting Him, I am absorbed into the True Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਜਮੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਭਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tis jam nerr na aavee jo har prabh bhaavai |2|
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not approach those who are pleasing to the Lord God. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁੰਨ ਦਾਨ ਜਪ ਤਪ ਜੇਤੇ ਸਭ ਊਪਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: pun daan jap tap jete sabh aoopar naam |
lines.english: Donations to charity, meditation and penance - above all of them is the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਭ੍ਰਮ ਮੋਹ ਗਏ ਕੋ ਦਿਸੈ ਨ ਬੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhai binase bhram moh ge ko disai na beea |
lines.english: His fears are removed, and his doubts and attachments are gone; he sees none other than God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਨਾ ਜੋ ਜਪੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਪੂਰਨ ਕਾਮੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har har rasanaa jo japai tis pooran kaam |3|
lines.english: One who chants with his tongue the Name of the Lord, Har, Har - his works are brought to perfect completion. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਖੇ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਥੀਆ ॥੪॥੧੮॥੧੨੦॥
lines.translit: naanak raakhe paarabraham fir dookh na theea |4|18|120|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Supreme Lord God preserves him, and no pain or sorrow afflicts him any longer. ||4||18||120||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਘਰੁ ੯ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa ghar 9 mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Ninth House, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤਵਉ ਚਿਤਵਿ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵਉ ਆਗੈ ਭਾਵਉ ਕਿ ਨ ਭਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: chitvau chitav sarab sukh paavau aagai bhaavau ki na bhaavau |
lines.english: Contemplating Him within my consciousness, I obtain total peace; but hereafter, will I be pleasing to Him or not?

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਸਗਲ ਹੈ ਜਾਚਿਕ ਦੂਸਰ ਕੈ ਪਹਿ ਜਾਵਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ek daataar sagal hai jaachik doosar kai peh jaavau |1|
lines.english: There is only One Giver; all others are beggars. Who else can we turn to? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਛਤ੍ਰਪਤਿ ਏਕੋ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਕਉਨੁ ਸਮਸਰਿ ਲਾਵਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sagal chhatrapat eko tthaakur kaun samasar laavau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The One Lord Master is the Supreme King of all; who else is equal to Him? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਮਾਗਉ ਆਨ ਲਜਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau maagau aan lajaavau |
lines.english: When I beg from others, I am ashamed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾਦਿਕ ਸਨਕਾਦਿਕ ਸਨਕ ਸਨੰਦਨ ਸਨਾਤਨ ਸਨਤਕੁਮਾਰ ਤਿਨੑ ਕਉ ਮਹਲੁ ਦੁਲਭਾਵਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: brahamaadik sanakaadik sanak sanandan sanaatan sanatakumaar tina kau mehal dulabhaavau |2|
lines.english: Even Brahma and the sages Sanak, Sanandan, Sanaatan and Sanat Kumar, find it difficult to obtain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਠਉ ਬੈਸਉ ਰਹਿ ਭਿ ਨ ਸਾਕਉ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਖੋਜਿ ਖੋਜਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: aootthau baisau reh bhi na saakau darasan khoj khojaavau |
lines.english: Standing up and sitting down, I cannot live without Him. I search and search for the Blessed Vision of His Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗਮ ਆਗਾਧਿ ਬੋਧ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਰੈ ਨ ਪਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: agam agam aagaadh bodh keemat parai na paavau |
lines.english: He is unapproachable and unfathomable; His wisdom is deep and profound; His value cannot be appraised.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਇਓ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਕਾਟਿਓ ਬੰਧੁ ਗਰਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: bheo kripaal deaal prabh tthaakur kaattio bandh garaavau |
lines.english: God, the Lord Master, has become kind and compassionate; He has cut the noose of death away from my neck.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਕੀ ਸਰਣਿ ਸਤਿ ਪੁਰਖ ਕੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਧਿਆਵਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: taakee saran sat purakh kee satigur purakh dhiaavau |3|
lines.english: I have taken to the Sanctuary of the True Lord, the Primal Being, and I meditate on the True Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਉ ਸਾਧਸੰਗੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਤਉ ਫਿਰਿ ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਆਵਉ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੨੧॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jau saadhasang paaeo tau fir janam na aavau |4|1|121|
lines.english: Says Nanak, now that I have obtained the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I shall not have to be reincarnated again. ||4||1||121||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗਾਵਉ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਗਾਵਉ ਗਾਵਉ ਜਾਗਿ ਸਵਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: antar gaavau baahar gaavau gaavau jaag savaaree |
lines.english: Inwardly, I sing His Praises, and outwardly, I sing His Praises; I sing His Praises while awake and asleep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਿ ਚਲਨ ਕਉ ਤੋਸਾ ਦੀਨੑਾ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨਾਮ ਕੇ ਬਿਉਹਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sang chalan kau tosaa deenaa gobind naam ke biauhaaree |1|
lines.english: I am a trader in the Name of the Lord of the Universe; He has given it to me as my supplies, to carry with me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਦਾਨੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਦੀਓ ਮੈ ਏਹੋ ਆਧਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam daan gur poorai deeo mai eho aadhaaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has given me the Gift of the Naam; this alone is my Support. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰ ਬਿਸਾਰੀ ਬਿਸਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: avar bisaaree bisaaree |
lines.english: I have forgotten and forsaken other things.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖਨਿ ਗਾਵਉ ਸੁਖਿ ਭੀ ਗਾਵਉ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪੰਥਿ ਸਮੑਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: dookhan gaavau sukh bhee gaavau maarag panth samaaree |
lines.english: I sing His Praises while suffering, and I sing His Praises while I am at peace as well. I contemplate Him while I walk along the Path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਦੀਆ ਮੋਰੀ ਤਿਸਾ ਬੁਝਾਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naam drirr gur man meh deea moree tisaa bujhaaree |2|
lines.english: The Guru has implanted the Naam within my mind, and my thirst has been quenched. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨੁ ਭੀ ਗਾਵਉ ਰੈਨੀ ਗਾਵਉ ਗਾਵਉ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਰਸਨਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: din bhee gaavau rainee gaavau gaavau saas saas rasanaaree |
lines.english: I sing His Praises during the day, and I sing His Praises during the night; I sing them with each and every breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਹਿ ਬਿਸਾਸੁ ਹੋਇ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਵਤ ਮਰਤ ਸੰਗਾਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satasangat meh bisaas hoe har jeevat marat sangaaree |3|
lines.english: In the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, this faith is established, that the Lord is with us, in life and in death. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਇਹੁ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਾਵਉ ਸੰਤ ਰੇਨ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kau ihu daan dehu prabh paavau sant ren ur dhaaree |
lines.english: Bless servant Nanak with this gift, O God, that he may obtain, and enshrine in his heart, the dust of the feet of the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰਵਨੀ ਕਥਾ ਨੈਨ ਦਰਸੁ ਪੇਖਉ ਮਸਤਕੁ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਨਾਰੀ ॥੪॥੨॥੧੨੨॥
lines.translit: sravanee kathaa nain daras pekhau masatak gur charanaaree |4|2|122|
lines.english: Hear the Lord's Sermon with your ears, and behold the Blessed Vision of His Darshan with your eyes; place your forehead upon the Guru's Feet. ||4||2||122||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru: Aasaa, Tenth House, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਘਰੁ ੧੦ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa ghar 10 mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru: Aasaa, Tenth House, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੂੰ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨਹਿ ਤੇ ਪਾਹੁਨ ਦੋ ਦਾਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis no toon asathir kar maaneh te paahun do daahaa |
lines.english: That which you believe to be permanent, is a guest here for only a few days.
